t: Projective Incidence Calculus
quotes: makes that distinction precise
a probabilistic logic, a piece of tropical geometry, and an executable Datalog program
h:
A seminar walk-through of the composition core of an autoregressive transformer, the part that doesn't just look things up.

  • Built from the ground up for a reader who knows linear algebra and a little probability: no transformers or symbolic AI assumed.
  • One object, three views: a probabilistic logic (T=1), a tropical geometry (T=0), and an executable Datalog program.
  • The companion to the research paper "What a Transformer Retrieves and What It Computes", every claim is grounded in a real model (Qwen2.5, the Pythia ladder).

Use ←/→ or the buttons. The right pane is the supplement's own text, each slide lights up the passage it draws from. Both PDFs are linked below.

t: Lookup, or genuine computation?
quotes: Ask a large language model for the capital of France and it answers
Probability is not truth-functional, you cannot get
h:
• "The capital of France is ___" looks like memorised lookup. But under a real prompt the decision is a mixture of many partial contributions, and context can push it off the stored table entirely.
  • So, per next-token decision, is the model:
    • (a) retrieving, reproducing one symbolic rule (an n-gram, an induction copy, a grammar constraint);
    • (b) selecting, choosing within a set a rule already proposed; or
    • (c) composing, producing something no single rule proposed?
The one-sentence theory: probability is not truth-functional, and Bundy's 1985 fix was to track incidences and recover probability as overlap. PIC says the transformer's core does exactly this, with the inner product playing "overlap."

t: The labour splits ~25 / 60 / 15
quotes: the labour divides roughly 25% retrieved, 60% selected, 15% composed
h:
• Across the models studied: ~25% retrieved · ~60% selected · ~15% composed.
  • Most apparent "computation" is really disambiguation within a retrieved set, retrieval + selection dominate every model.
  • The small composed band is the irreducible computation, and it grows monotonically with scale (7.8% → 14.8% up the Pythia ladder against a fixed store). Bigger models compute more.
[[FIG1]]

t: The handful of symbols you'll need
quotes: This section collects the notation used throughout
h:
Everything is re-explained at first use; this is just the cheat-sheet.

  • ⟨u, v⟩, the inner product: one number for how much two vectors point the same way.
  • r = Σj dj, the residual stream: the sum of every component's write dj.
  • Uv, the unembedding direction of token v; Lv = ⟨r, Uv⟩ + bv its logit.
  • cjv = ⟨dj, Uv⟩, source j's vote for token v; Gvw = ⟨Uv, Uw⟩, the Gram matrix.
  • Diagnostics: PR (effective # of sources), µt (how many sources already pick t), Δ (winning margin).

t: Just enough transformer: the residual stream
quotes: these updates are additive
the residual stream is the internal scratchpad into which that context gets distilled
h:
• Every attention head and MLP writes into one shared running sum, the residual stream r = Σ dj. The writes are additive: no nonlinearity sits between them and the readout.
  • The model reads out token logits by a linear comparison: Lv = ⟨r, Uv⟩ + bv, then a softmax.
Mind the trap: the residual stream is not the "context." The context window is the input text; the residual stream is the internal scratchpad that text gets distilled into, and it's that scratchpad the theory analyses.

t: Direct logit attribution: every source votes
quotes: This exact, bias-free decomposition
h:
• Because the readout is linear in r = Σ dj, the logit itself splits into one contribution per component: Lv = Σj cjv, where cjv = ⟨dj, Uv⟩.
  • This is direct logit attribution (DLA), exact and bias-free, not an approximation.
  • It is the bridge from continuous machinery to a logical reading: each source casts a real-valued vote for each token, and the column sums decide.

This single decomposition is the seed of all three interpretations.

t: Why "not truth-functional" is the whole game
quotes: is the Gram matrix of the unembedding frame
the whole non-truth-functional story in one number
h:
• Competing tokens are not independent: near-synonyms (Ut ≈ Uv) move together; orthogonal directions don't.
  • All these couplings live in the Gram matrix Gvw = ⟨Uv, Uw⟩, unnormalised cosine similarity of token directions (the "king–queen vs bicycle" intuition).
  • Worked miniature: Paris/Lyon/bicycle. The single off-diagonal 0.95 coupling Paris↔Lyon is the entire non-truth-functional story in one number.
G is the object that will carry every coupling the rest of the theory needs.

t: Bundy's incidence calculus
quotes: The missing information is how the events overlap
Bundy’s move is to stop treating probability as the primitive object and treat overlap as primitive
h:
• The defect: probability isn't truth-functional, P(A) and P(B) don't fix P(A∧B). Same marginals can give three different answers; the missing information is how the events overlap.
  • Bundy's fix: stop treating probability as primitive; track incidences (possible worlds where a proposition holds) and recover probability as the relative size of an overlap, P(A) = |i(A)| / |I|.
  • Connectives become honest set operations (∧ = ∩, ∨ = ∪). Truth-functionality is restored at the level of sets; non-truth-functional probability falls out.

t: The conjunction the marginals cannot see
quotes: Let I = {1, 2, 3, 4, 5, 6} be six equally likely worlds
A truth-functional guess would have had no way to produce 1/3
h:
Six equally likely worlds; two propositions:

  • i(A) = {1,2,3,4}, i(B) = {3,4,5,6} → P(A) = P(B) = 2/3.
  • Conjunction from the sets: i(A∧B) = {3,4} → P(A∧B) = 1/3.

A truth-functional guess can't produce 1/3: independent gives 4/9, mutually exclusive gives 0, both discard the overlap.

Move the same marginals to a different overlap, i(B′) = i(A), and P(A∧B′) = 2/3. Identical marginals, different conjunction, only the incidences tell them apart.

t: From sets to directions
quotes: incidence sets are replaced by directions in an inner-product space
PIC is therefore a strict generalisation
h:
The single liberalising step (Definition 1, the PIC dictionary):

BundyPICin the model
incidence set i(A)direction Uvunembedding row
overlap |i(A)∩i(B)|kernel GvwGram of the frame
∧, ∨ (set ops)weighted thresholdthe composed connective
P(A)=|i(A)|/|I|softmax(L)voutput probability
  • Incidence sets become directions in an inner-product space; overlap becomes the kernel value Gvw.
  • When G is diagonal (mutually exclusive outcomes), PIC collapses to Bundy's classical case, so PIC is a strict generalisation that adds the off-diagonal coupling.

t: It's not about magnitude: PR ≈ 45 for all routes
quotes: the split is not a magnitude distinction
the participation ratio PR ≈ 45 is the same for all three routes
h:
• Tempting hypothesis: "retrieved = one dominant circuit shouts loudest." False.
  • The participation ratio PR ≈ 45, the effective number of contributing sources, is the same for all three routes. No single circuit ever decides by magnitude; even a perfect n-gram lookup rides a ~45-way additive sum.
  • So what does separate the routes? Two other, measurable axes:
    • margin (geometry), distance to the decision boundary;
    • readout multiplicity µt (logic), does any single source already pick the token?

Those two axes are exactly what the three interpretations formalise.

t: One object, three readings, set by temperature
quotes: a single mathematical object that can be read three ways
A semiring is a set equipped with two operations
the choice of semiring is exactly the temperature dial
h:
The composition core is a single mathematical object read three ways, governed by one knob, the temperature T (equivalently, a choice of semiring).

[[FIG2]]

A semiring has an "add" ⊕ (combine alternatives) and a "multiply" ⊗ (chain steps), minus subtraction, which is what lets ⊕ = max count as addition.

semiring⊕yields
log (T=1)log Σ expthe softmax
tropical (T=0)maxthe greedy arg max

Same program Lv = Σ cjv, only the arithmetic changes. The choice of semiring is exactly the temperature dial.

t: Logic (T=1): the softmax is a product of experts
quotes: equivalently a product of experts
h:
• Sources are vectors dj; tokens are propositions Uv; the vote cjv is DLA. Combination is signed accumulation in the exponent, which is equivalently a product of experts: each source reweights a token's mass by exp(vote).
  • Theorem 1: the output probabilities come out exactly as Bundy incidence frequencies, the softmax, recovered parameter-free. "Probability as proportion of worlds," forty years on.
Product of experts (AND / intersect / sharpen), not the gated mixture of experts (OR / hedge). The residual stream tallies a product; an MoE router picks the panel.

t: Geometry (T=0): a tropical power diagram
quotes: is a tropical polynomial in r
Laguerre power diagram
h:
• The max-logit M(r) = maxv(⟨r, Uv⟩ + bv) is a tropical polynomial in r; its linear regions tile residual space into a Laguerre power diagram, a weighted Voronoi diagram whose sites are the token directions.
  • The cell a residual lands in is the predicted token.
  • Retrieved tokens sit deep inside their cell (large margin); composed tokens hug a facet, emergence = landing in an interior cell no single source owns.

t: The decision surface, made concrete (Fig. 3)
quotes: decision surface is the Laguerre power diagram of the unembedding directions
a composed token sits close to a facet
h:
• Each token direction Uv is a site; residual space tiles into cells (a token wins the arg max) separated by facets (two tokens tie).
  • The residual vector r lands in one cell, that's the prediction. A retrieved token sits deep inside its cell; a composed token sits close to a facet.
  • Prop. 2 (measured): the normalised margin Δ/‖Ut−Uv*‖ is the exact perpendicular Euclidean distance from r to the nearest facet.
[[FIG3]]

t: Computation: one Datalog program, two semirings
quotes: a semiring-weighted Datalog program
h:
• The core's decode is a semiring-weighted Datalog program Π under a provenance semiring: stratified clauses for the retrievable fragment, a flagged dense aggregate for the computed one.
  • Evaluating Π is inference. The log-semiring gives the softmax; the tropical semiring gives the greedy decode, one program, two temperatures.
  • Why Datalog, not Prolog: semiring laws survive (no cut/clause-order), bottom-up least fixpoint matches residual accumulation, and it is decidable & statically analysable (PTIME data complexity).

Caveat (see §8): the program's value is exact for any G, but scalar-semiring provenance is exact only on diagonal G.

t: Maslov dequantization: the temperature you know
quotes: softmax and arg max are not two algorithms but two ends of one
h:
• The "temperature" in every chat API is this dial. Rescale logits by L/T before the softmax: T=1 is the model's own distribution; T→0 sharpens onto the arg max (greedy decode).
  • Maslov dequantization is the formal T→0 limit: the smooth log-semiring deforms continuously into the tropical (max,+) semiring, just as a cooling system settles into its ground state.
So softmax and arg max are not two algorithms but two ends of one temperature-controlled deformation, and Theorem 5 makes the limit rigorous (the Maslov sandwich).

t: Recovered, not posited
quotes: they are recovered as consequences of the single additive
the conceptual leap is in the identification
h:
Nothing is assumed, every claim is a consequence of Lv = Σ cjv plus the Gram matrix G. The conceptual leap is the identification; after it the mathematics is short.

The next slides walk the six load-bearing results:

  • Thm 1 recovered probability · Thm 2 cardinality-inertness
  • Thm 3 non-truth-functionality is a kernel · Thm 4 weighted-threshold expressivity
  • Prop 1/2 power diagram & margin-as-distance · Thm 5 two temperatures · Thm 6 diffuseness

Each is elementary once the identification is made, and each has a transcribed proof skeleton (Appendix A).

t: The softmax is recovered as an incidence frequency
quotes: PIC adds no free parameter, the softmax falls out
h:
• Start from a uniform base measure over propositions, and let each source reweight token v's mass multiplicatively by exp(cjv).
  • After all sources act, the normalised mass of v is exactly exp(Lv) / Σ exp(Lw), the softmax. The common base cancels (distributivity only).
  • So the Gibbs/softmax distribution is a PIC incidence frequency: "probability as proportion of worlds," parameter-free.
The uniform base is the "proportion of worlds" assumption, PIC adds no free parameter, and G is structural, not injected noise, so it shapes the logits with no variance trade-off.

t: Cardinality-inertness: the count carries no weight
quotes: the raw count of voting sources is causally inert
swung from two to zero and the decision did not move at all
h:
• The worry: maybe a token wins because many sources vote for it. No, the decision is arg max of the column totals Lv alone; the readout multiplicity µt never enters L.
  • Worked example, two sources over {A,B,C}, both with column sums L = (10,6,6):
    • Scenario 1: both pick A → µA = 2 ("retrieved" look).
    • Scenario 2: one picks B, one picks C → µA = 0 ("composed" look).
    Identical winner, identical margin Δ = 4. The count of supporters swung 2 → 0, yet the decision didn't move.
µt is a label read off afterwards, never a cause. The causal variable is the margin.

t: Non-truth-functionality is a kernel
quotes: competition hardness is read directly off the frame Gram
the margin it buys collapses from 3 to 0.15
h:
• For unit directions, the squared separation is ‖Ut−Uv‖² = 2(1−ρ), with ρ = ⟨Ut, Uv⟩ the runner-up coherence. So competition hardness is read directly off the Gram.
  • As ρ → 1 (near-synonyms), shared evidence is common-mode and cancels in the difference; only the orthogonal sliver separates the outcomes. The diagonal-G limit (ρ = 0) is the classical disjoint case.
Worked budget: a source giving "3 units of evidence for t" buys a margin that collapses from 3 to 0.15 as ρ goes 0 → 0.95. The separation is a hard Cauchy–Schwarz budget.

t: Composed tokens need a weighted threshold
quotes: Outcome 0 wins, although it is nobody’s first choice
the discrete cousin of XOR
h:
• Two sources over {0,1,2}: c₁=(2,3,0), c₂=(2,0,3) → L=(4,3,3). Outcome 0 wins, although it is nobody's first choice.
  • As a Boolean rule (∩/∪): source 1 asserts 1, source 2 asserts 2, no AND/OR can ever output 0. A truth-functional logic is blind to the answer.
  • As a weighted threshold (Σ wj cjv > θ, a perceptron): modest-but-agreeing support for 0 outweighs strong-but-lonely support for 1 and 2.
This is the discrete cousin of XOR, the µt=0 signature, "the winner of a sum that is the winner of no summand," and exactly the expressive power composition has over retrieval.

t: The margin is a distance; the cells are a power diagram
quotes: the cell of minimum power distance is exactly the arg max token
exact signed Euclidean distance from r to the
h:
• Prop 1: the linear regions of the max-logit are the Laguerre power diagram of the sites {Uv} with weights (bv, ‖Uv‖²). Polarise the squared distances and the ‖r‖² terms cancel: minimum power distance = maximum score = the arg max token.
  • Prop 2: the normalised margin (Lt−Lv*)/‖Ut−Uv*‖ is the exact signed Euclidean distance from r to the t–v* facet, a point-to-hyperplane distance, no approximation.

These turn Figure 3 from a picture into two theorems: the geometry is literally true, and the margin is literally measurable.

t: The capstone: two temperatures, one program
quotes: the same program Π, evaluated under two different semirings
h:
• Read Π as a semiring functional aggregate query: sources combine by ⊗ along the residual derivation (Σj cjv = Lv), competing tokens combine by ⊕.
  • Log-semiring → aggregate is log Σ exp(Lv), per-token share is the softmax (T=1).
  • Tropical semiring → aggregate is maxv Lv, witness is the greedy arg max (T=0).
  • The two are squeezed together by the Maslov sandwich: max L ≤ T log Σ exp(L/T) ≤ max L + T log|V|.
The same program Π under two semirings returns the softmax you sample and the arg max you decode. One program, two temperatures, joined by Maslov dequantization.

t: Retrieved vs composed, measured
quotes: even this canonical lookup is assembled from a
composition is a genuine non-local divergence from the rule, not a near-miss
h:
• Retrieved ("…the capital of France is"): the residual sits deep in the "Paris" cell (large margin), µt ≥ 1, yet even this canonical lookup is assembled from a ~45-way sum, not one circuit.
  • Composed (µt = 0): the residual hugs a facet, and (the sharper test) for ~85% of composed tokens the nearest facet isn't even the store's own prediction. Composition is a genuine non-local divergence, not a near-miss.
  • Roughly 80% of composed tokens are strictly emergent (µt = 0).

t: Ablation, and a model that heals itself
quotes: single-component ablation therefore understates how a prediction is really computed
the repair here is diffuse
h:
Ablation = zero a component's write and rerun; if the prediction changes, call it a flip. Flips tell causes from mere votes.

  • Route-ordered fragility: single-circuit ablation flips Retrieved ~22% < Selected ~40% < Composed ~54% (~2.4×), but a margin-matched split shows margin is the governor, not the route label.
  • Self-repair ("Hydra"): downstream blocks rewrite toward the original token, so single-component ablation understates how a prediction is really computed.
  • Redundancy is non-compensatory: agreement among weak readers is not fault tolerance.
The repair here is diffuse, no single backup unit you could disable to stop it.

t: Diffuseness, and what it means for deployment
quotes: no bounded-size formula can localise it
quantise the retrievable tier hard but should protect the computed core
h:
• If a causal quantity is spread equitably over PR modules (E = Σ em, em = E/PR), single-source influence is 1/PR and a bounded coalition captures only |A|/PR. As PR → ∞ the captured fraction → 0.
  • So the repair, like the readout, is distributed over ~45 modules: no surgical target, no bounded-size formula can localise it.
Deployment payoff: the retrievable tier is low-PR, the computed core is the high-PR diffuse layer. Quantise the retrievable tier hard but protect the computed core, exactly where int4 error concentrates (composed 5.9–18.8% vs retrieved 3.6–2.4%).

t: What's measured, and what's left open
quotes: generalisation target is therefore a non-autoregressive model
If the provenance gap and the expressivity separation close, the consequence is a clean, falsifiable picture of a transformer
h:
• Provenance gap (central): the static value is exact under any G; what dense G breaks is the provenance, scalar semirings are exact only on diagonal G. A geometry-valued provenance carrying G would close it.
  • Tropical-rank floor and treewidth: candidate "third measures" of the same wall, does PR = tropical rank = treewidth, or diverge on the dense fragment?
  • Beyond autoregressive: the static algebra isn't transformer-specific; diffusion LMs are the cleanest generalisation target.
  • Scale: evidence is sub-billion-parameter, frontier-scale behaviour is untested.
If these close, you get a falsifiable picture: an extractable, auditable retrievable tier vs a diffuse computed core that admits no compact symbolic form.

t: Mostly retrieval, a scale-growing computed core
quotes: spends most of its labour retrieving and selecting
the central idea is Bundy’s
h:
• A transformer spends most of its labour retrieving and selecting; a small, scale-growing remainder computes something new, now measurable, with an exact geometric and causal characterisation.
  • One kernel G, one wall seen three ways (logic / geometry / computation), one homomorphism between temperatures. Not analogies, one theory.
What to remember: the split is about margin and multiplicity, not magnitude; the softmax is recovered, not imposed; softmax and arg max are one program at two temperatures; the computed core is diffuse by theorem, so it resists both localisation and compression.

And the lineage is the point: the central idea is Bundy's, incidence calculus meeting a substrate he could not have had. Full PDFs linked below.
